title: Reusable metal assembled straw
abstract: The invention relates to an assembled reusable metal straw, consisting of three separate portions. Each portion, the straight end portion (1), the straight middle portion (2) and the angular end portion (3), are attachable to the adjacent one either by clasping due to an existing pressed tip (4) or by screwing by means of a thread (5). The article is made of stainless steel or anodized aluminium and generally of food-grade materials. The length of each portion may be equal to or different from the others. Internal cleaning of the object can be done with a special brush (6).
claims: Claims 1. A reusable metallic assembled straw consisting of a straight end portion (1), a straight middle portion (2) and an angular end portion (3), characterized in that each portion is connected to the adjacent one forming the straw. 2. A reusable metallic assembled straw according to claim 1, characterized in that the straight end portion (1) and the straight middle portion (2) each have a pressed tip (4) to clasp to their adjacent portion. 3. A reusable metallic assembled straw according to claim 1, characterized in that the straight middle portion (2) and the angular end portion (3) each have a pressed tip (4) to clasp to their adjacent portion. 4. A reusable metallic assembled straw according to claim 1, characterized in that the straight end portion (1) and the straight middle portion (2) each have a thread (5) to screw with turns existing respectively on each adj acent part thereof. 5. A reusable metallic assembled straw according to claim 1, characterized in that the straight middle portion (2) and the angular end portion (3) each have a thread (5) to screw to the turns existing respectively on each adjacent portion thereof.
